seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email.
new_constraint: Refrain from using the phrase "thank you for the opportunity."
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email. Refrain from using the phrase "thank you for the opportunity."
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Date].

I have decided to move on to a new chapter in my career, but I wanted to express my sincere gratitude for the time I have spent here. **Thank you for the opportunity** to work with such a talented team and to contribute to the success of our projects. I have truly valued the professional growth I experienced under your leadership.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my final weeks. Please let me know how I can best assist in handing over my current responsibilities and training a replacement.

Once again, **thank you for the opportunity** to be a part of this organization. I wish you and the company nothing but continued success in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Personal Email Address]<turn|>
